title: Hide sorting arrows?
excerpt: Does anyone know if there a way to hide the blue sorting arrow icons, but keep the sorted view? The arrows are very distracting.

posts.author: Scott-Pigeon (Scott Sosebee)
posts.cookedHtml: Does anyone know if there a way to hide the blue sorting arrow icons, but keep the sorted view? The arrows are very distracting.

posts.author: daniel.marozzo (Daniel Marozzo)
posts.cookedHtml: not sure if you still need help here, but if you click the 3 dots beside the title of your column. Then hover over sort → save order of items. Once you save it should remove the sorting arrows.
